name: scouter-mcp
description: Query Scouter APM (objects, counters, XLog transactions) over stdio via a Scouter collector.

scouter_password.title: Scouter Password
scouter_password.description: Scouter login password. Stored locally in plaintext (0600 config file), not the OS keychain — prefer a least-privilege / read-only account.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone for time-range parsing and display

include_bind_params.title: Include SQL Bind Parameters
include_bind_params.description: Whether get_xlog_detail may include SQL bind parameters (true/false). Set to false when bind values can contain PII; the LLM cannot re-enable them.

tools.name: get_counter
tools.description: Query counter time series over a past range.

tools.name: get_counter_stat
tools.description: Long-range counter stats at fixed 5-minute resolution (up to 31 days).

tools.name: list_counters
tools.description: List available counter metadata for an objType.

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Daily pre-aggregated stats (service/sql/apiCall/ip/userAgent/error/alert), no XLog scanning.

tools.name: get_xlog_detail
tools.description: Get a single XLog detail (profile steps/SQL/errors).

tools.name: get_xlog_by_gxid
tools.description: List XLogs belonging to the same gxid.

tools.name: list_alerts
tools.description: List past collector alerts over a window.

tools.name: get_active_services
tools.description: List services currently running on an agent.

tools.name: list_threads
tools.description: List JVM threads for an agent, with state histogram and top CPU rows.

tools.name: get_thread_detail
tools.description: Live thread detail for an active transaction (stack trace, lock owner, current SQL).

tools.name: get_object_env
tools.description: Read an agent's JVM system properties (secrets masked).
